description_long: This is a square, upholstered storage toolbox with a deep blue, textured fabric exterior and four short, sturdy black legs. The lid is hinged and can be lifted to reveal a spacious, open interior compartment, which is lined with a dark material and supported by metallic hinges. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with no visible handles or external hardware for carrying. The lid fits flush with the base when closed, creating a seamless appearance. The toolbox is designed to sit on the ground and can double as a small bench or ottoman due to its flat, cushioned top. There are no visible brand markings, labels, or decorative elements on the exterior.
description: A square, blue fabric-upholstered storage toolbox with a hinged lid and four black legs, featuring a spacious interior compartment and a modern, minimal design.
description_view_0: Front and top views show the closed and open lid positions, revealing the deep blue fabric exterior and the dark, spacious interior compartment.
description_view_1: Side view with the lid open, highlighting the depth of the compartment and the metallic hinge mechanism.
description_view_2: Rear and front views with the lid open and closed, emphasizing the seamless, unadorned back and the boxy shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the lid open, showing the thickness of the lid and the interior lining.
attribute_handle_type: No visible external handle; lid is lifted directly by hand, with no fixed, folding, or telescopic handle present.
attribute_latch_mechanism: No visible latch or locking mechanism; lid appears to be held closed by gravity or internal fit.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment with no visible trays, dividers, or removable bins; compartment is open and lined.
